sourcesContent:
import React from 'react'
import { Box, Button, Image, Text, Drawer, DrawerOverlay, DrawerCloseButton, useDisclosure, DrawerContent, DrawerHeader, Input, DrawerBody, DrawerFooter  } from "@chakra-ui/react"
import { HamburgerIcon } from '@chakra-ui/icons'
import '../App.css'

function DrawerExample() {
    const { isOpen, onOpen, onClose } = useDisclosure()
    const btnRef = React.useRef()
    return (
      <>
        <Button sx={{top:4, right:4, width:50, height:50, position:'fixed'}} ref={btnRef} colorScheme='blackAlpha' onClick={onOpen}>
          <HamburgerIcon/>
        </Button>
        <Drawer
          isOpen={isOpen}
          placement='right'
          onClose={onClose}
          trapFocus={false}
        >
          <DrawerContent>
            <DrawerCloseButton />
            <DrawerHeader>Create your account</DrawerHeader>
  
            <DrawerBody>
              <Input placeholder='Type here...' />
            </DrawerBody>
  
            <DrawerFooter>
              <Button variant='outline' mr={3} onClick={onClose}>
                Cancel
              </Button>
              <Button colorScheme='blue'>Save</Button>
            </DrawerFooter>
          </DrawerContent>
        </Drawer>
      </>
    )
}

const Home = () => {
  return (
    <>
        <Box id='banner' style={{width:'100%', height:878, backgroundImage:"url('/background.jpg')", backgroundSize:'cover', backgroundPosition:'start'}}>
            <Text sx={{display:'flex', justifyContent:'center', pt:300, fontSize:'500%',height:390}}>Thomas Villaverde</Text>
            <Text sx={{display:'flex', justifyContent:'center', pl:60, fontSize:40}} as='i'>Full Stack Developer</Text>
            <DrawerExample/>
        </Box>
        <Box id='' style={{width:'100%', height:878}}>

        </Box>
    </>
  )
}

export default Home
